Call 'SUB: Social Media Upload — Dynamic Multi-Account v5'

parameters.content:
## Main Workflow — Social Media Upload Orchestrator

**Two trigger sources:**
- ClickUp: task moves to status `Ready to Post`
- Google Sheet: row has Status = `Ready to Post`

**Flow:**
1. Fetch task/row data (accounts, urls, caption, title)
2. Validate required fields
3. For each valid task → call Sub-Workflow
4. Sub-workflow handles platform routing + upload + status writeback

**Sub-workflow ID:** `aWlKSOQzwTtC5K3Z`

**Required ClickUp task fields:**
- Accounts (text): comma-separated e.g. `arya instagram, arya youtube`
- Reel URL (text): Google Drive share URL
- Cover URL (text): Google Drive share URL
- Caption (text): leave empty for AI generation
- Title (text): video title

**Required Google Sheet columns:**
Accounts | Reel URL | Cover URL | Caption | Title | Status | Posted At | Post ID | Platform | Account | Error

## Branch A — ClickUp
Triggers when a task status changes to `Ready to Post`.
Fetches full task details including custom fields.

## Branch B — Google Sheet
Polls every minute for rows where Status = `Ready to Post`.
Updates Status to `Processing` immediately to avoid double-processing.

**Sheet columns required (row 1 headers):**
Accounts | Reel URL | Cover URL | Caption | Title | Status | Posted At | Post ID | Platform | Account | Error
